titleStmt.title: SII 19.248: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 248. (A.R. No. 193 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARUDŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAHĀLINGASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of 50 kāśu deposited with the assembly of Tirunilakkuḍi in Tiraimūr-nāḍu as sabhai-taniśu by one Kaṟṟaḷi-Paṭṭālākaṉ and invested by them with a merchant of Tiruviḍaimarudil by name Tiruviyalūr-Śāttaṉ of Kōmar (Kōmal). With the interest on this amount an uḻakku of ghee was to be supplied every day for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. The nāḍu is stated to have been under the control (mēnāyakam) of Śandirāśaṉ (Chandrāditya) Śatturugaṇḍaṉ of Varampūśal. The writing of the inscription is comparatively late pointing to the reign of Rājēndra-Chōḷa I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu varampūcalu
ṭaiyāṉ cantirācaṉ catturukaṇṭaṉ meṉāya kattu tiraimurnāṭṭu tiruni
lakkuṭi sabhaiyom kaṟṟaḷi paṭṭālakaṉniṭaiy sabhaiytaṉicāka koṇṭu
kaṭava kācu 5 10 Ikkācu Ampatukkum Iññāṭṭu tiruviṭaimarutil vyāpāri koma
ruṭaiyāṉ tiruviyalūr cāttaṉniṭaiy koṇṭu kuṭutta kācu 5 10 Ikkācu Ampa
tukkum palicai(y)yāka tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil Ivaṉ taṉakkāka vai
cca nontāviḷakku Oṉṟinukku nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇaiy cantrātittava
l tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilukke koṭuvantu Aṭṭuvomānom
tirunilakuṭi sabhai paṇikka [ Ikka] lveṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ
Ivvūr madhyastaṉ toṇaṉ Ayyaṉāṉa tiraimur nā
ṭṭu peruṅkāviriyeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 19.248 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
